positive: A stylized, abstract illustration of a celestial forest at twilight. The scene features glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna integrated with ancient, stylized tree silhouettes. The palette is dominated by deep indigos, vibrant teals, cosmic purples, and accents of luminous gold and emerald green. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, creating a meditative, cyclical pattern suitable for apparel printing. Clean line work meets ethereal gradients, emphasizing the contrast between dark, silhouetted trunks and glowing, luminous elements. The overall mood is mystical and hopeful. Vector-art quality, designed for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, low detail, text, logo, watermark, signature, grain, noise, ugly, bad anatomy, dirty, extra limbs, copyright, cinematic, photorealistic
